item.title: Eight-Year-Old Boy Airlifted to Florida After Suffering Serious Head Injuries in North Bimini Shooting — Sunday, May 24th, 2026
item.ns0:title: Eight-Year-Old Boy Airlifted to Florida After Suffering Serious Head Injuries in North Bimini Shooting — Sunday, May 24th, 2026
item.description:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, a community is in shock after an eight-year-old boy is airlifted for emergency treatment following a tragic shooting in North Bimini. We dive into the political fallout as a former House Speaker reveals what he believes triggered a crushing election defeat and calls for major electoral reform. Our team also follows the US Ambassador’s visit to BTVI to expand student opportunities and takes you under the waves for the unveiling of Grand Bahama’s first underwater sculpture museum. Watch the full broadcast for these stories, a record-shattering performance from Devyn Charlton, and a special look at the mental health legacy of Hurricane Dorian.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, a community is in shock after an eight-year-old boy is airlifted for emergency treatment following a tragic shooting in North Bimini. We dive into the political fallout as a former House Speaker reveals what he believes triggered a crushing election defeat and calls for major electoral reform. Our team also follows the US Ambassador’s visit to BTVI to expand student opportunities and takes you under the waves for the unveiling of Grand Bahama’s first underwater sculpture museum. Watch the full broadcast for these stories, a record-shattering performance from Devyn Charlton, and a special look at the mental health legacy of Hurricane Dorian.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News Weekend, a community is in shock after an eight-year-old boy is airlifted for emergency treatment following a tragic shooting in North Bimini. We dive into the political fallout as a former House Speaker reveals what he believes triggered a crushing election defeat and calls for major electoral reform. Our team also follows the US Ambassador’s visit to BTVI to expand student opportunities and takes you under the waves for the unveiling of Grand Bahama’s first underwater sculpture museum. Watch the full broadcast for these stories, a record-shattering performance from Devyn Charlton, and a special look at the mental health legacy of Hurricane Dorian.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
